reviews.comment:

The staff is friendly. A good place to stop.

reviews.comment:
Estación de Servicio media, pero bien ubicada. Tiene todos los servicios que YPF suele dar.

(Translated by Google)
A mid-range service station, but well located. It has all the services that YPF usually offers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBal9TQjFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños siempre limpios y una hermosa zona para almorzar con parrilla y mesas con bancos.

(Translated by Google)
Always clean bathrooms and a beautiful lunch area with a grill and tables with benches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBck42NFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy caros los alimentos en el servicio de proveeduria, no trabajan con tarjeta de crédito

(Translated by Google)
The food at the store is very expensive, and they don't accept credit cards.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, por eso los elijos cono punto de parada en mis viajes. Sigan así

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, that's why I choose them as a stop on my trips. Keep it up!

reviews.comment:
Porque es bueno y está en el lugar justo y tiene todo controlar el tema de agua caliente  muy importante. Para el viajero
